tasks.label: Maestro: Spec Run (需确认YES)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c='${input:confirmRun}'; if($c -ne 'YES'){ Write-Host '未确认，已取消执行'; exit 1 }; python -m maestro_flow.cli spec run --file '${input:specFile}'"

tasks.label: Maestro: Spec Run (Mock, 需确认YES)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c='${input:confirmRun}'; if($c -ne 'YES'){ Write-Host '未确认，已取消执行'; exit 1 }; python -m maestro_flow.cli spec run --file '${input:specFile}' --mock --skip-gates"

tasks.label: Maestro: Run Requirement (需确认YES)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c='${input:confirmRun}'; if($c -ne 'YES'){ Write-Host '未确认，已取消执行'; exit 1 }; python -m maestro_flow.cli run --requirement '${input:requirement}' --skip-gates"

inputs.description: 输入 YES 才会执行（其他内容将取消）
